scripts.dev:mini: npm run build:js && npm run sync:miniprogram-npm
scripts.sync:miniprogram-npm: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$src='node_modules/tdesign-miniprogram/miniprogram_dist'; $dst='miniprogram/miniprogram_npm/tdesign-miniprogram'; if (Test-Path $dst) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $dst }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dst | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path ($src + '/*') -Destination $dst -Recurse -Force"
